all.en: The weekly pipeline review brings every account executive together on Monday.
all.zh: 每週 pipeline 檢視會議於週一集合所有客戶經理。

all.en: The sales director opens by sharing aggregate quota attainment numbers.
all.zh: 業務總監先分享整體配額達成數字。

all.en: Current pipeline coverage stands at two point eight times quota.
all.zh: 目前 pipeline 覆蓋率為配額的兩點八倍。

all.en: The healthy benchmark for this stage is three times quota.
all.zh: 現階段健康的標竿為配額的三倍。

all.en: Each rep walks through their top five active opportunities.
all.zh: 每位業務員逐一說明其前五大進行中機會。

all.en: Deal stage, close date, and amount are reviewed in detail.
all.zh: 案件階段、結案日期與金額均詳細檢視。

all.en: Stalled deals receive specific attention from the leadership team.
all.zh: 停滯案件獲得管理團隊的特別關注。

all.en: Coaches ask probing questions about decision makers and budgets.
all.zh: 教練針對決策者與預算提出深入問題。

all.en: Mutual close plans are required for all deals above fifty thousand.
all.zh: 所有金額超過五萬的案件皆需備有雙方確認的結案計畫。

all.en: Reps without a documented next step must update notes immediately.
all.zh: 未記錄下一步行動的業務員須立即更新筆記。

all.en: Forecast categories include commit, best case, and pipeline.
all.zh: 預估類別包括承諾、最佳情境與 pipeline。

all.en: Commit deals are expected to close with high confidence this quarter.
all.zh: 承諾案件預期將以高信心度於本季結案。

all.en: Best case deals require additional verification before counting them.
all.zh: 最佳情境案件於計入前需額外驗證。

all.en: Slipped deals from last quarter are flagged for executive review.
all.zh: 上一季延滯案件已標記供主管階層檢視。

all.en: Lost opportunity analysis helps the team learn from competitive losses.
all.zh: 失敗機會分析協助團隊從競爭失利中學習。

all.en: Pricing pressure was cited in four of the seven recent losses.
all.zh: 近期七件流失案件中有四件提及價格壓力。

all.en: Two losses involved feature gaps the product team is now addressing.
all.zh: 兩件流失案件涉及功能缺口，產品團隊正在處理。

all.en: New logo creation remains the highest priority for the region.
all.zh: 新客戶開發仍是該區域的最高優先事項。

all.en: Cross sell opportunities into the installed base are also tracked.
all.zh: 對既有客戶的交叉銷售機會亦納入追蹤。

all.en: Sales operations will publish updated dashboards by Friday morning.
all.zh: 業務營運將於週五早上前發佈更新後的儀表板。

all.en: Reps are reminded to log every customer interaction in the system.
all.zh: 提醒業務員將每次客戶互動記錄於系統中。

all.en: Action items are captured and assigned with clear owners and dates.
all.zh: 行動項目均記錄並指派明確負責人與日期。

all.en: The meeting closes with a brief motivational message from leadership.
all.zh: 會議於管理層簡短的激勵訊息中結束。

all.en: Discipline in the pipeline drives predictability in revenue results.
all.zh: pipeline 的紀律驅動營收成果的可預測性。

all.en: Next week the team will conduct a deep dive on opportunities expected to close in 30 days.
all.zh: 下週團隊將針對預期三十天內結案的機會進行深度檢討。

all.en: Sales engineers have been assigned to support all enterprise-tier accounts through evaluation.
all.zh: 已指派業務工程師於評估期間支援所有企業級客戶。

all.en: Reps are encouraged to leverage executive sponsors when navigating complex decision chains.
all.zh: 鼓勵業務員在處理複雜決策鏈時運用高階主管贊助者。

all.en: Account planning sessions for top ten strategic accounts will begin the following week.
all.zh: 前十大策略客戶的客戶規劃會議將於下週開始。

all.en: The marketing team has pledged additional air cover for late-stage enterprise opportunities.
all.zh: 行銷團隊承諾為後期企業機會提供額外的行銷支援。

all.en: Demo environments have been refreshed to reflect the most recent product enhancements.
all.zh: 展示環境已更新以反映最新的產品強化功能。

all.en: Reps should rehearse demos in advance with their solutions consultant partners.
all.zh: 業務員應事先與解決方案顧問夥伴共同預演展示。

all.en: Discounting beyond approved thresholds requires formal escalation to the deal desk.
all.zh: 超出核准門檻的折扣需正式上呈至交易委員會。

all.en: The leadership team thanked everyone for their continued focus and energy this quarter.
all.zh: 管理團隊感謝大家本季持續的專注與投入。

all.en: Strong execution week after week is what will deliver our annual goals.
all.zh: 週復一週的紮實執行將是我們達成年度目標的關鍵。

all.en: Pipeline hygiene metrics will be reviewed alongside opportunity velocity going forward.
all.zh: pipeline 整潔度指標未來將與機會推進速度一併檢視。

all.en: Reps with stalled deals past 60 days must present recovery plans to leadership.
all.zh: 案件停滯逾六十天的業務員須向管理層提報挽救計畫。

all.en: A peer mentorship program is being launched to pair top performers with new hires.
all.zh: 即將啟動同儕導師計畫，將頂尖業績者與新進人員配對。

all.en: Sandbagging or pulling forward deals inappropriately will be flagged in monthly audits.
all.zh: 不當壓低或提前認列案件將於每月稽核中標示。

all.en: Forecast accuracy targets have been set at plus or minus 5 percent for the quarter.
all.zh: 本季預估準確度目標設定於正負百分之五區間。

all.en: Reps are encouraged to use the new conversation intelligence tool to refine discovery calls.
all.zh: 鼓勵業務員使用新版對話智慧工具優化需求探索通話。

all.en: Sales playbooks for three key industries will be refreshed by the end of the month.
all.zh: 三個關鍵產業的業務操作手冊將於月底前更新完成。

all.en: Pipeline generation activities will be tracked weekly with new dashboards starting Monday.
all.zh: pipeline 開發活動將自週一起透過新儀表板每週追蹤。

all.en: Sales operations is available to assist with any opportunity data cleanup requests.
all.zh: 業務營運可協助處理任何機會資料清整需求。

all.en: We close this week with confidence that disciplined execution will fuel the next phase of growth.
all.zh: 我們以信心結束本週，相信紀律執行將驅動下一階段的成長。
